steps.title: Read the variables in context
steps.content: The variable $x$ is the number of small jars, and $y$ is the number of large jars. The equation $5x+8y=40$ splits the $40$ cups of salsa into the amounts placed in each jar size.

steps.title: Interpret the large-jar term
steps.content: The coefficient $8$ means each large jar holds $8$ cups. Multiplying by $y$, the number of large jars, gives the total cups of salsa in the large jars.

steps.title: Choose the matching statement
steps.content: So $8y$ represents the total number of cups of salsa in the large jars. The answer is C.
